name: Bijan Paul
title: Senior Lecturer
department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
bio_raw:
He has nearly nine years of experience as a software engineer (one and half years) and as a Faculty member of different Universities (around eight years). After completing his graduation, he joined Shahjalal University of Science and Technology as a Researcher and Software Engineer. The project name was: "Mongol Dip", Bi-Lingual Audio Assistance Supported Screen Reading Software developed for People with Visual Impairments. His developed software "Mongol Dip" was awarded the "ICT Special Award" from the Prime Minister of Bangladesh for the contribution of developing ICT-based aiding tools for Visually Impaired people. He also has Industrial Experience and worked as a Consultant in a Multinational Company named “Reve System Limited”, Dhaka, eGeneration Limited.
At that part of his life, he could feel the urge to be a researcher. He has just about eight years of teaching experience. Currently, He is working as a Senior Lecturer, Computer Science and Engineering Department at the University of Liberal Arts Bangladesh. His research interest includes Machine Learning, Vehicular Adhoc Network, Human-computer Interaction and Internet of Things.
